name: JoAi: Delete Document

description.en: Permanently delete a document or template from your agent's knowledge base. This cannot be undone.
description.de: Ein Dokument oder Template dauerhaft aus der Wissensdatenbank deines Agenten löschen. Dies kann nicht rückgängig gemacht werden.
description.es: Permanently delete a document or template from your agent's knowledge base. This cannot be undone.
description.fr: Permanently delete a document or template from your agent's knowledge base. This cannot be undone.
description.ro: Permanently delete a document or template from your agent's knowledge base. This cannot be undone.
description.it: Permanently delete a document or template from your agent's knowledge base. This cannot be undone.

bot: Use this when the user wants to remove a document or template from the knowledge base.

inputs.name: Document ID

description.en: The ID of the document to delete
description.de: Die ID des zu löschenden Dokuments
description.es: The ID of the document to delete
description.fr: The ID of the document to delete
description.ro: The ID of the document to delete
description.it: The ID of the document to delete

inputs.bot: The hashid of the document to delete.
